verdicts.distribution: Approaches complex Gaussian as index grows (CLT effect)
verdicts.G_geom: Large monodromy group (likely U(r) or USp(r), NOT SU(2))
verdicts.weil_bound: |S_H(t)| <= sqrt(r) does NOT hold in general
verdicts.growth_rate: max|S_H| ~ sqrt(r * log(index)), consistent with Gaussian CLT
